scope: Project-level reusable Luo Qinghe multi-state character reference board.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood lock
project material and tactile surface lock
Canyang Ao palette reference for medicine-room earth, herb, old wood, smoke, and fire accents
locked Zhaoming emblem continuity reference only; do not redesign or display as a clean public badge
locked old empire symbol extension reference for hidden partial old-relay marks only

downstream_usage: Prompt Room character identity lock for Luo Qinghe
wardrobe, prop, and performance reference for Luo Qinghe

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Luo Qinghe's old relay identity is hidden inside the medicine-room system and cannot appear as a clean public badge.
Preserve her as a beautiful 37-year-old woman and village physician, not an elderly woman or mystic priestess.
Clothing must stay complete, clean enough to show construction, role-specific, and practical.
Distress clothing only through herb stains, smoke, soot, singed edges, small repairs, and limited fire-state damage.
No visible text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, or watermark inside generated images.
